title: Vivo V70 FE confirmed to launched in India: Launch date, expected specs and all you need to know
summary: The Vivo V70 FE will launch in India on April 2, 2026. Leaks suggest that the device could feature a 200MP camera, a MediaTek 7360 processor, and a large 7000mAh battery.

title: X down for thousands of users, global outage disrupts timeline and mobile app
summary: Elon Musk's social media platform X is experiencing outages, affecting thousands of users. Downdetector reports over 30,000 complaints regarding the platform's functionality today.

title: Samsung reveals Galaxy A37, A57 India price: Check launch offers, specificiations and more
summary: Samsung has finally revealed the pricing for its Galaxy A series lineup which was launched yesterday. The Galaxy A37 begins at a price of ₹41,999 while the Galaxy A57 starts at ₹56,999.

title: Meta to turn employees into ‘AI builders’, reorganize teams into smaller pods amid Reality Labs layoffs: Report
summary: Meta is rebranding employees as AI builders and organising them into pods within its Reality Labs division, according to a new report. The pilot program is aimed at enhancing engineering productivity and product quality through cross-disciplinary work.

title: Apple to 'distill' Google's Gemini into smaller models to power localized iPhone AI features: Report
summary: Apple's partnership with Google allows it to ‘distill’ Gemini model to create smaller models to run AI features on device on iPhones. Apple had earlier this year announced its partnership with Google to power Siri and run other AI features

title: Discord says technical issue resolved hours after users complained of downtime
summary: Discord had reported an issue after 14,000 users faced issues in connecting on voice call. Many reported seeing the message ‘awaiting endpoint’, signaling a failure to establish voice communication

title: Gemini gets a major upgrade as Google adds 3-minute AI music generation: here's how it works
summary: Gemini's new Lyria 3 Pro integration enables the creation of 3-minute music tracks with improved fidelity and customization. It supports diverse applications, from study music to jingles, while adhering to copyright policies with embedded SynthID watermarks for content verification.

title: Reddit will now ask accounts with ‘fishy behavior’ to verify they are human: here's how it will work
summary: Reddit is implementing measures to ensure users interact with real people, not AI. Reddit CEO Steve Huffman announced a targeted verification system for suspicious accounts and the use of third-party tools to confirm human identity of its users.

title: WWDC 26: Apple to unveil dedicated Siri chatbot and systemwide AI agent in iOS 27, says report
summary: Apple is set to unveil a standalone Siri app and new features on June 8 at WWDC 26. The AI update, codenamed Campo, aims to provide a chatbot-like experience and deeper integration across iOS and Mac applications with the aim to turn it into a systemwide AI agent.

title: WhatsApp update: AI will now write your messages, touch up photos within chat
summary: According to the company, even for those using the Writing Help option, the chats will remain private. The update will let users manage storage, move chats between phones and use two WhatsApp accounts on one phone.

title: Meta unveils TRIBE v2: AI model for human brain that predicts neural responses
summary: The Trimodal Brain Encoder (TRIBE v2) allows users to create a digital twin for neural activity. To build it, 700 volunteers were exposed to a wide range of media, including podcasts, films, images, and written text, while their brain activity was recorded using functional magnetic resonance imaging

title: Tom Brady-backed telehealth firm eMed valued at over $2 billion in latest funding round
summary: Telehealth company eMed has secured $200 million in funding, boosting its valuation to over $2 billion. This investment will fuel the development of its agentic AI platform. eMed is also introducing a new healthcare payment model designed to reduce employer healthcare expenses.

title: South Korea to invest $166 million in AI chip startup Rebellions
summary: South Korea Financial Services Commission approved a 250 billion won investment in Rebellions, an AI chip startup. This funding supports Rebellions' chip production and development. title: Elon Musk’s X to integrate Grok AI into core recommendation algorithm next week
summary: The move comes months after Musk open-sourced parts of X’s recommendation system, with the aim of improving transparency. title: AI spend in India’s financial services sector to double in 2026: QED Investors
summary: This will be driven equally by incumbents and early adopters. Legacy institutions are expected to outspend in the near term due to their scale, but innovation will be driven by startups.

title: Apple adds Bosch, Cirrus Logic, others to US manufacturing program, to invest $400 million
summary: Apple is significantly boosting its US manufacturing efforts. The tech giant is investing $400 million by 2030 to bring production of vital components like sensors and integrated circuits back home. New partners Bosch, Cirrus Logic, TDK, and Qnity Electronics will join this ambitious plan.

title: UK PM 'very keen' to curb addictive social media after US ruling
summary: British PM Keir Starmer is eager to address addictive social media features. This follows a significant US court decision holding Meta and YouTube accountable for user harm. The UK government is reviewing new restrictions for social media apps. Discussions are ongoing regarding a potential ban on so

title: US jury verdicts against Meta, Google tee up fight over tech liability shield
summary: Tech giants Meta and Google have been found liable in US courts for harm caused to young users. Juries awarded millions in damages in cases involving depression and suicidal thoughts linked to platform use. These verdicts challenge Section 230, a law protecting tech firms from lawsuits over user-gen

title: UK sanctions Cambodia-based scam centre and crypto platform
summary: Britain has imposed sanctions on operators of a massive fraud compound in Cambodia and an online crypto marketplace.
